// Study Materials

Resources

🇬🇪

Georgian Language A1

Complete A1 study package: alphabet, grammar rules, 400+ vocabulary, 300 practice questions, and midterm exam simulation.

🧬

Genetics Master Guide

Complete study guide covering all 10 topics: Introduction, Methods, Chromosomes, Mutations, Inheritance, Single Gene Disorders, Chromosomal Disorders, Molecular Basis, Hemoglobinopathies, Metabolic Disorders.

✅ Available MED2011/2012 Year II
$
🫀

Cardiology Quick Notes

Heart failure, arrhythmias, valvular disease — all clinical scenarios for Year IV-V.

🔜 Coming Soon
🧪

Pharmacology Drug Tables

Mechanism, side effects, interactions — organized by system and drug class.

🔜 Coming Soon
🦠

Microbiology Quick Reference

Bacteria, viruses, fungi and parasites — clinical correlations and treatment.

🔜 Coming Soon
📊

Biostatistics Formulas

All the stats formulas you need for Research Methodology and exams.

🔜 Coming Soon
🏥

Clinical Skills Checklists

History taking, physical exam, procedural skills — step by step.

🔜 Coming Soon
